name: Snowed in!
description:
It's that time of year again and the snow is coming down harder than expected. You're having a party with your friends, Marlene, Adam, Alan, and Lily at your cabin when you quickly realize that you're snowed in due to all the snow blocking the door! What will you do in this unexpected situation?

P.S: Personality is left empty to allow for more creativity on the user's end.

TW: Depending on how you progress the story, things can quickly go south with the potential for extreme violence and .
creator: firefoxsly20
